query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_queue (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  conversationId INT,
  ticketId INT,
  position INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('waiting', 'assigned', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'waiting' NOT NULL,
  assignedOperatorId INT,
  assignedOperatorName VARCHAR(255),
  initialMessage TEXT,
  priority ENUM('normal', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'normal' NOT NULL,
  enteredAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  acceptedAt BIGINT,
  completedAt BIGINT,
  INDEX queue_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX queue_status_idx (status),
  INDEX queue_position_idx (position),
  INDEX queue_operator_idx (assignedOperatorId)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  conversationId INT,
  ticketId INT,
  position INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('waiting', 'assigned', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'waiting' NOT NULL,
  assignedOperatorId INT,
  assignedOperatorName VARCHAR(255),
  initialMessage TEXT,
  priority ENUM('normal', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'normal' NOT NULL,
  enteredAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  acceptedAt BIGINT,
  completedAt BIGINT,
  INDEX queue_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX queue_status_idx (status),
  INDEX queue_position_idx (position),
  INDEX queue_operator_idx (assignedOperatorId)
);
